headline: Whirlpool’s Dividend Cut Is a Cautionary Tale. How to Know If Your Payouts Are Safe.
summary: Whirlpool isn’t the first high profile company to slash its payout this year. Chemicals company LyondellBasell Industries, once the highest yielding company in the S&P 500, cut its payout by 50% in February.
